emails.body: Does Carol North work in Credit? Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 03/05/2001 10:04 AM Carol North/ENRON@enronXgate 03/05/2001 09:37 AM

emails.body: Does Carol North work in Credit? Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 03/05/2001 10:04 AM Carol North/ENRON@enronXgate 03/05/2001 09:37 AM

emails.subject: RE: Click Paper Approvals
emails.body: Tana, The distinction is that Carol and Aparna work for Ken supporting credit for Enron Industrial Markets, which where the pulp and paper world resides. Walter and I support Enron Global Markets where EOL lives and breathes. tm
